page_home_language_container_desc: Select your favorite language among available ones
page_home_language_container_note: If you see weird text, try to clear your browser's cache
page_home_aboutme_container_p1: I am a small YouTuber and streamer on both YouTube and Twitch.
page_home_aboutme_container_p2: I'm mostly making video-games related content.
page_home_videogames_container_p2: I play Geometry Dash often and yeah that's pretty much it.
page_home_videogames_container_p3: My account is TeamGeekOff, so feel free to spam-send me messages.
page_home_videogames_container_p5: idk i feel like mentionning it would help me getting ideas for my website
page_home_videogames_container_p6: Roblox (not often these last days tough), Project SEKAI (daily-play lol), R.E.P.O. (last time I opened R.E.P.O.: 2 months ago... probably), Fortnite (i played 5 minutes then uninstalled it), Baldi's Basics + (even tough I'm way less on it), and way too much more
page_home_streamlinks_container_desc: That text is missing! Please report it to Team Geek's Brain, as it just broke.
page_schedules_note1: (everytime you see an hour, it'll be indicated as UTC)
page_schedules_note2: (as of right now, no stream is scheduled on Sundays)
page_announcements_languages2_p1: To switch language, you must go to the page's footer and press on the language you'd like.
page_announcements_languages2_p2: As of right now, French, English and Japanese are still the available languages.
page_announcements_languages2_p3: You can also switch language by adding "?lang=(language code)" in the URL (in supported pages)
page_announcements_cheapviewers_1: Sending "cheap" Viewers Links is FORBIDDEN and has ALREADY BEEN FORBIDDEN!
page_announcements_cheapviewers_2: I do not accept in any ways buying viewers, no matter what the reason is, no matter what the price is.
page_announcements_cheapviewers_3: If you do send a link that allows users to buy viewers or followers, you will be PERMANENTLY BANNED and REPORTED to Twitch once the livestream ends.
page_announcements_languages_p1: Geeky House now supports multiple languages!
page_announcements_languages_p2: This includes French, English and Japanese.
page_announcements_languages_p3: (Since I don't know how to speak Japanese, I'm using AI to translate to it. Don't blame me)
page_announcements_newwebsite_p2: Made in three hours because I don't have a life rn
page_announcements_newwebsite_p3: yet i'm having fun with my viewers
page_tgdindex_etr2: This is probably the 8 735th GDPS to do that, but whatever.
page_tgdindex_etr4: This GDPS allows Top players, bad creators, and some random players... Actually, every players are welcome.
page_tgdindex_etr6: This GDPS is available on both mobile and PC.
page_tgddemonlist_soon: Demonlist comes when levels are actually published on the GDPS
page_tgddownload_text1: In a legal Geometry Dash copy, download "Geode" and the mod "GDPS Switcher" by km7dev and Alphii.
page_tgddownload_text2: Once it is downloaded, press on the new button in the Geometry Dash menu and press the New button in the bottom-right corner.
page_tgddownload_text3: Click "Save", press "Use" and restart the game.
